titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 66: The Kaiten - Mawasun Da!!
Simple 1500シリーズ Vol.66 The 回転 まわすんだ!!

descriptions.text: Simple 1500 Series vol. 66: The Kaiten - Mawasun Da!! is a collection of a lot of wacky mini games with a difficult control method since in most of the games the player has to turn quickly the left analog stick to gain speed and is really hard to do it.
